report_name: NIST Tackles AI Security Risks with New 'Cyber AI Profile'

identities.name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
identities.description: U.S. government agency developing the 'Cyber AI Profile' to help organizations manage security risks associated with artificial intelligence, based on the NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0.

identities.name: National Cybersecurity Center of Excellence
identities.description: A center within the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) responsible for developing the 'Cyber AI Profile'.

relationships.source_name: National Institute of Standards and Technology

relationships.target_name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
